name: R3F Post-Processing Stack
description: A React Three Fiber scene with @react-three/postprocessing stack: bloom, depth of field, vignette, chromatic aberration, and noise. Elevates visual quality with cinematic effects.

requiredElements.name: bloom-pass
requiredElements.description: Bloom effect with threshold tuned so only highlights glow, not whole scene.

requiredElements.name: tone-mapping
requiredElements.description: ACESFilmicToneMapping or ToneMapping effect for filmic color response.

requiredElements.name: vignette
requiredElements.description: Vignette effect for cinematic edge darkening.

optionalElements.name: depth-of-field
optionalElements.description: DepthOfField effect for focal plane blur.

optionalElements.name: chromatic-aberration
optionalElements.description: ChromaticAberration for lens distortion at edges.

optionalElements.name: noise
optionalElements.description: Noise effect for film grain texture.

optionalElements.name: ssao
optionalElements.description: N8AO or SSAO for ambient occlusion contact shadows.

qualityRules.description: Bloom threshold set so only emissive highlights bloom, not mid-tones.
Tone mapping produces filmic, not washed-out, color response.
Vignette is subtle, not overwhelming — guides eye to center.
Effects compose coherently — no one effect dominates.
Post-processing runs at 60fps; effects are not redundant.
EffectComposer and passes dispose on unmount.
DPR capped at 2; post-processing resolution scales with DPR.

antiPatterns.description: Bloom threshold too low or intensity too high — whole scene glows, looks cheap.
No tone mapping — bright areas clip to white, colors look flat.
Too many effects stacked — 30fps or worse on mid-range GPUs.
DPR unbounded — 4K retina renders post-processing at 2x cost for no benefit.

improvementSuggestions.description: Add DepthOfField for cinematic focal plane.
Add subtle ChromaticAberration at screen edges for lens realism.
Add film grain Noise for analog texture.

exampleOutputs.label: R3F postprocessing stack
exampleOutputs.snippet:
<EffectComposer>
  <Bloom intensity={1.0} luminanceThreshold={0.85} luminanceSmoothing={0.4} mipmapBlur />
  <ToneMapping mode={ACESFilmic} />
  <Vignette eskil={false} offset={0.3} darkness={0.8} />
</EffectComposer>
